outcomes.title: Film 1 — Final Demo in production
outcomes.description: A 22-second film showing how bankruptcy automation works natively inside Spectrum, resolving the switching objection for potential partners.

outcomes.title: Client portal live
outcomes.description: A private, password-protected portal where bkWatch can see project progress, leave comments, review scenes, and track deliverables in real time.

outcomes.title: AI roadmap delivered
outcomes.description: A practical, research-backed plan showing where bkWatch can add AI to their operations, marketing, and service — with clear value and effort guidance for each opportunity.

outcomes.title: Brand knowledge library built
outcomes.description: A searchable library of bkWatch's brand, products, features, and communication guidelines — organized and accessible through the portal.

outcomes.title: Monthly video series
outcomes.description: A 30-second video every month, building a library of content that shows bkWatch's value to potential partners and clients.

outcomes.title: AI workflow implementation
outcomes.description: Teaching and implementing AI-powered workflows to automate routine tasks starting in month two.

narrative.summary: Third i started with one film project for bkWatch and has already delivered a client portal, an AI roadmap, and a brand knowledge library alongside the film. As the relationship grows, Third i will deliver a new video every month, add AI workflow training, and expand into new service areas — all designed to compound value over time.
narrative.faster: Each video builds on the visual system and brand knowledge from the last one, so production gets faster with every delivery. The workflow learns bkWatch's brand, audience, and product details, reducing setup time and revision rounds.
narrative.smarter: Third i's understanding of bkWatch's product, audience, and goals deepens with every project. The AI roadmap already maps where AI can add the most value — and that map gets sharper as we work together.
narrative.expanding: What started as one film is growing into a full partnership: monthly videos, AI workflow training, brand assets, and on-call creative support. By month six, Third i becomes an expanded partner — not just a film producer, but a creative and AI collaborator across the business.

source: Third i value tracking — hours from time tracking; outcomes from portal project data
